title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.200 - Violation a misdemeanor (first and second class counties)
text:
64.200.  Violation a misdemeanor (first and second class counties). — A violation of sections 64.170 to 64.200 or of any order or regulation adopted under the authority of said sections shall be deemed a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 14945, A.L. 1945 p. 616) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13752; 1919 § 10394; 1909 § 1297
